web.title: Elle Residences Miami: Homepage
web.description: Inspired by 80 years of trendsetting fashion and decor, the world's first ELLE Residences arrives fully finished, perfectly furnished and ready-to-live.
web.markdown:
# The New Home of High Style

## Prêt-à-Vivre

Live in high style in Edgewater, on the runway to Miami’s design, fashion and cultural districts. Inspired by 80 years of trendsetting fashion and decor, the world’s first **ELLE Residences** arrives fully finished, perfectly furnished and ready-to-live.

## AT A GLANCE

Own a sweet retreat in the heart of Miami and take advantage of our fully managed rental program when not in residence, or use the rental platform of your choice.

![](https://elleresidencesmiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/vedee_01_hero_high-1.jpg)

**189**

RESIDENCES

**26** FLOORS

ONE TO TWO

**bedrooms**

**2** POOLS

## **The** RESIDENCES

Own your pied-à-terre in the heart of Miami. Inspired by the pages of ELLE DECOR, the Residences blend mid-century modern and contemporary French chic with a splash of tropical luxury, for a new twist on South Florida living

[Step Inside](https://elleresidencesmiami.com/the-residences/)

![](https://elleresidencesmiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/toa_23_3-960x813.jpg)

## Timeless Style, Urban Elegance

[book a preview](https://elleresidencesmiami.com/inquire/)

![](https://elleresidencesmiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/vedee_04_entrance_high-2-960x814.jpg)

## **The** AMENITIES

Discover a collection of lifestyle amenities curated for chic and effortless living. It’s not just a home.

ELLE Residences will be your lounge, café, pool club, playground and more.

[experience more](https://elleresidencesmiami.com/the-amenities/)

## **The** NEIGHBORHOOD

The Place to be in the place to be, Edgewater is minutes from Miami’s design, fashion and cultural districts, with easy access to hip shops, restaurants, clubs, co-working, beaches and more.

[explore edgewater](https://elleresidencesmiami.com/the-neighborhood/)

![](https://elleresidencesmiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/toa_23_3-1-960x813.jpg)

## **The** TEAM

the brand

![](https://elleresidencesmiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/ctezq9tuaaafhya-bw-1.jpg)

branded real Estate

arquinaut

![](https://elleresidencesmiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/maison-elle-paris_salon-bibliothe.jpg)

architecture

behar font & partners

![](https://elleresidencesmiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/optima-plaza-aventura-florida-1.jpg)

landscape

L&ND DESIGN

![](https://elleresidencesmiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/venetianislandsmasterpiecewithlandscapedesignbylnddesignhitsmarketfor22-1-1.jpg)

Interior design

The One Atelier

![](https://elleresidencesmiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/design-hills-living-1.jpg)

[Meet our People](https://elleresidencesmiami.com/the-team/)

![](https://elleresidencesmiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/vertical-logo-positivo.png)

development

## All the Latest

EXPLORE THE LATEST NEWS, NOTES AND DISPATCHES FROM ELLE RESIDENCES MIAMI.

[explore the guide](https://elleresidencesmiami.com/journal/)

## Get in Touch

REQUEST A PRIVATE PREVIEW

## What's special

Discover ELLE Residences Miami - a sophisticated 25-story luxury tower inspired by the iconic French fashion magazine ELLE, blending timeless European elegance with Miami's vibrant tropical lifestyle. Featuring 180 exquisitely designed one- and two-bedroom residences, each unit showcases impeccable finishes and exclusive décor curated by the ELLE brand.
Perfectly positioned on Biscayne Bay at 36th Street, ELLE Residences offers unparalleled access to Miami's Design District, Midtown's culinary scene, and seamless connectivity to Miami Beach and the international airport. Its contemporary French chic style combined with tropical luxury creates an unmatched living experience.
Designed for flexibility, ELLE Residences welcomes daily rentals via Airbnb and similar platforms, empowering owners to maximize income potential while enjoying a ready-to-live home.
Experience the new standard of luxury where refined design meets exceptional comfort-welcome to ELLE Residences, where elegance lives by the bay. HABLAMOS ESPAÑOL.

Show more

## Schedule tour

Request a tour

DGS Real Estate

![](https://photos.zillowstatic.com/fp/26d02dc76fffca5a294867db54499f5d-l_c.jpg)

DGS REAL ESTATE is a specialized real estate boutique firm that provides national and international investors comprehensive advice to facilitate and realize efficient, suitable, safe, and profitable top-notch real estate investments in Miami and New York.

DGS REAL ESTATE addresses and manages all key financial, legal, and tax issues throughout the investment process, including, if and when required, procurement of guaranteed mortgage financing in the US for all investors.

DGS REAL ESTATE is the real estate boutique to which investors from around the world turn to when looking to invest -whether large, medium or small scale - in prime real estate in the Miami or New York markets. Our company gives investors the reassurance of working together with a qualified team of professionals that provides them with relevant and timely step-by-step advise, addressing and seamlessly solving all issues involved in realizing a real estate investment in the US.

...Read more
